new_value: {"notes":"Recovered only three non-wire Python link hardening hunks: secrets-backed epoch generation with failure propagation, sequence advancement after successful queue insertion, and CAD-before-pop queue preservation. Added independent entropy, queue-full counter, and full same-priority CAD-busy tests. Gates: tests/link 147 passed/4 skipped, focused 33 passed, Ruff changed files, strict mypy changed source, diff check, three hash-bound reviews. Full suite is blocked by pre-existing tests/test_hypothesis.py import of nonexistent InvalidFrame; project-wide mypy has unrelated baseline errors. Radio failure queue loss tracked separately as project-LICHEN-050u."}
Python link hardening hunks extracted and verified
